title: clutia affinis var. genuina
intro: Clutia affinis var. genuina, also known as the Clutia plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Clusiaceae family. It is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Clutia affinis var. genuina include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and skin issues. Clutia affinis var. genuina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
